title: 1mg Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: 1mg Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Join the 1mg Capital India family as a Full Stack Developer in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About 1mg Capital India:
1mg Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with 1mg Capital India!
